---
title: ORCID rendering in the \author block (sanity check on _print-author.tex)
format:
  jss-pdf:
    keep-tex: true
author:
  - name: Orcid Author
    orcid: 0000-0000-0000-0001
    email: orcid@example.com
    affiliations:
      - name: ORCID University
keywords: [test]
---

Test body paragraph.
